strategy.hint: 4 independent workstreams, safe to parallelize. Rescan after each phase to verify.

move.reason: 1 orphaned files + 2 single-use files + 22 flat directories + 2 naming issues

primary_action.description: 7 unused issues in 1 cluster(s) — run `desloppify next`

narrative.why_now: 4 independent workstreams, safe to parallelize. Rescan after each phase to verify.

clusters.name: auto/smells-console_error_no_throw
clusters.description: Fix 6 console error no throw issues

clusters.name: trivial-fixes
clusters.description: Zero-judgment mechanical fixes. For each item: read the issue detail, apply the fix, verify with tsc.

clusters.name: struct-medialightbox
clusters.description: Decompose MediaLightbox monster subsystem (896 LOC main, 809 LOC state hook). 5 structural + 5 review items. READ ALL REVIEW ITEMS FIRST — they contain a staged reorg plan for the hooks/ directory and specific architectural fixes.

clusters.name: struct-travel-timeline
clusters.description: Decompose timeline subsystem. 6 structural + 4 review items. Reviews guide: consolidate position ownership into ONE hook, split god hook, add queue cancellation, strip AI scaffolding comments.

clusters.name: struct-travel-shot-editor
clusters.description: Decompose shot editor. 5 structural + 3 review items. Reviews guide: fix param bag sprawl, pick one structure-video contract, rename legacy defaults.

clusters.name: struct-travel-gallery
clusters.description: Decompose video gallery components. 6 structural + 1 review item. VideoShotDisplay (845 LOC) is worst. Review says couple upload feedback to mutation outcome in SortableShotItem.

clusters.name: struct-phase-config
clusters.description: Decompose PhaseConfigSelectorModal subsystem. 4 items, all 500-778 LOC. PhaseConfigVertical (778 LOC) is worst. PhaseConfigSelectorModal has 9 useStates — consolidate into a reducer.

clusters.name: struct-tests
clusters.description: Split oversized test files. Lowest priority — do after all production code.

clusters.name: async-discipline
clusters.description: INVESTIGATION RESULT: Almost all 36 items are false positives — the functions already await all their async work correctly. The linter flags them because the outer function signature says async but never uses a bare await at the top level (it awaits inside try/catch, conditionals, etc). The fix for ~33 of 36 items is: REMOVE THE ASYNC KEYWORD if the function returns a Promise directly, OR verify the function genuinely needs async. Only 3 items need ADD VOID (test file + migration effect).

clusters.name: review-cross-module
clusters.description: Highest score impact (cross-module arch at 44%). 4 items targeting the worst-scoring dimension.

clusters.name: review-design-coherence
clusters.description: 2nd worst dimension (46.9%). After moving overlapping items out, 3 items remain: auth orchestration, home auth mixed responsibilities, supabase types.

clusters.name: review-api-init-error
clusters.description: API/init/error dimensions (48-58%). After moving overlapping items out, 4 items remain: cache keys, optimistic updates, task details errors.

clusters.name: struct-media-gallery
clusters.description: Decompose MediaGallery (768 LOC) and MediaGalleryItem (701 LOC). See per-item notes for exact extraction targets.

clusters.name: struct-prompt-generation
clusters.description: Decompose PromptEditorModal (472 LOC) and PromptGenerationControls (742 LOC). Key finding: PromptGenerationControls has DUPLICATED rules/constraints UI rendered twice (mobile + desktop) — extract to single RulesInput component.

clusters.name: struct-video-editors
clusters.description: Decompose VideoPortionEditor (599 LOC), TrimControlsPanel (408 LOC), StyledVideoPlayer (376 LOC), and Visualization (502 LOC). All are video playback/trim components sharing similar patterns.

clusters.name: struct-settings-onboarding
clusters.description: Decompose GenerationSection (750 LOC), OnboardingModal (620 LOC), LoraSelectorModal (276 LOC). OnboardingModal has 7+ inline step components that should each be their own file.

clusters.name: struct-shot-image-manager
clusters.description: Decompose ShotImageManagerDesktop (390 LOC) and ShotImageManagerMobile (440 LOC). Extract shared shot-image logic, keep desktop/mobile as thin layout shells. Also AdvancedSettingsSection (389 LOC).

clusters.name: struct-tasks-details
clusters.description: Decompose TaskItem (460 LOC), TaskList (388 LOC), VideoTravelDetails (485 LOC). The task_details_dual_presenter_drift review item guides shared extraction between TaskDetailsModal and TaskDetailsPanel.

clusters.name: struct-shared-hooks-lib
clusters.description: Decompose 8 large shared hooks and lib files (483-870 LOC each). Review items for toolSettingsService and RealtimeConnection guide the decomposition. See per-item notes.

clusters.name: struct-tool-specific
clusters.description: Decompose tool-specific files: useInlineEditState (512 LOC), useClipManager (581 LOC), BatchSelector (391 LOC), ProductTour (417 LOC). Review items for useClipManager guide async-race and localStorage fixes.

clusters.name: review-shared-organization
clusters.description: Fix shared directory organization: hooks mixes UI and domain concerns, lib mixes generic and domain logic, ProjectContext has dual API surface. Move domain hooks to features/domains, move domain caches/repos to domains.

clusters.name: review-supabase-patterns
clusters.description: Normalize Supabase/API patterns: unify throw-first repos vs result-checked hooks (pick result-checked), deduplicate auth referral flows, fix HuggingFace key protocol mismatch.

clusters.name: review-resource-browser
clusters.description: Fix resource browser issues: resource update path leaks ownership details (add ownership check before update), silent list truncation at 20k (add pagination or explicit limit indicator).

clusters.name: review-remaining
clusters.description: Remaining review items: (1) preloading coupled to realtime status — decouple queue from connectivity, (2) task-type boundary needs tests — add integration tests, (3) task invalidation is a stub — implement real invalidation or document why stub is acceptable.
